title: femboyTXTpack
description: This text pack will turn you into a femboy xdddd
body:
This text pack will turn you into a femboy xdddd

This text pack was made with the intention of saying thanks, not to insult any community or anything like that.

I didn't make this text pack myself, I made it with a friend one game night lol. It was fun, anything that goes wrong is her fault lol.
